chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-79 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.03.2025 Mr. Bhoro Bheel, advocate for petitioner Mr. Rahim Bux Assistant P.G a/w SHO Mithi Inspector Qadir Bux, IO/SHO P.S Women Mirpurkhas Inspector Momal and SIP Muhammad Khan of P.S Khipro <>*<> Mr. Kanji Mal Meghwar advocate file vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.9 which is taken on record. Learned APG files comments, statement and compliance report on behalf of respondents No.3, 5 and 7 respectively, which are taken on record and copies have been supplied to petitioner’s counsel. IO/SHO P.S Women Mirpurkhas submits that challan has been finalised and such report under Section 173 Cr.P.C has been submitted before the learned Magistrate concerned. She placed on record photocopies of road certificate regarding submission of challan. She further submits that learned Magistrate has taken the cognizance of the alleged offence and now the matter is fixed for trial. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that since final challan has been submitted, therefore, petitioner will avail the remedy before the learned trial Court in accordance with law and under instruction does not wish to press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
